description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on every push to any branch and on pull requests to any branch. The workflow has multiple jobs for different environments: macos-10.15, msys2-i686, msys2-x86_64, ubuntu-18.04, ubuntu-20.04, ubuntu-mingw-win32, and ubuntu-mingw-win64. Each job sets up dependencies and runs make features and make commands.
